2026-04-15T20:33:27.4102707Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-15T20:33:27.4103239Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-15T20:33:27.4103607Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
